Event: Imperial Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 16/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: W35
Metropolitan Adventurer Wand

Once in a while, the wand bearer throws a magic orb at a random enemy unit. The orb bounces up to 3 times. It deals 160000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage on hit and casts Boulder on them for 3 sec. The target can't move and takes 40% more damage. The target also takes 64000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 140000 (+bonus of spell power) pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 55% for 2 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 120000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Imperial Treasure Hunt

Event date: 16/08/2025

Sage bot code: W35

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
